title: Extract own image features
author: dimvarsamis
body:
Hello, this is a really nice work, congratulations!! I wanted to ask if is it possible to extract my own image features during the train process of the model and not load them.

thanks

title: Details about baseline model
author: PeterBishop0
body:
In baseline model ，class Attention use x = v * q ，however, in BUTD paper ,it use the feature vector v concatenated with the question embedding q
Maybe I misunderstood it , but it would be nice of you to explain my confusion !THANKS!

title: something about training
author: IRIS00123
body: 您好，在GitHub上看到了您对近年来VQA模型复现的Git项目，非常感兴趣。我是一名对VQA感兴趣的在读研究生，有个问题想请教一下，在训练过程中，dataloader部分，question和answer的索引和编码占用了大约两至三分钟的时间，导致训练一个epoch需要大量的时间，训练效率低。您是怎么解决这个问题的呢？有什么建议吗？万分感谢！[机智]

title: Permission for reuse?
author: ghost
body:
Hi and thanks for this awesome re-implementation. I'm developing an API for VQA and I wonder if I can add your models to my model-warehouse for this API. 

Best, 
Ali
